summary: This document outlines an interview guide designed for General Practitioners to understand their consultation workflows and patient intake processes. It details specific questions regarding data gathering efficiency, pre-consultation information utility, and potential pilot program participation for a new service. The content reflects the startup's research phase to validate product-market fit within NHS practices.
